name: Pit Barbeque Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, combine all ingredients.
2. Stir until well mixed and bring to a simmer over medium heat.
3. Reduce heat to low and stir continuously for about 30 minutes until the mixture thickens.
4. Remove from heat and let cool before using or storing in an airtight container in the refrigerator if desired.
